mapper.sql: alevel_source_bundle_file_id, alevel_source_bundle_id, alevel_source_file_id, file_role, is_primary, match_status, match_confidence, match_evidence_json, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_source_bundle_file WHERE alevel_source_bundle_file_id = #{bundleFileId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_source_bundle_file WHERE alevel_source_bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_source_bundle_file_id ASC
SELECT FROM alevel_source_bundle_file WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_source_bundle_file_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_source_bundle_file SET alevel_source_bundle_id = #{alevelSourceBundleId}, alevel_source_file_id = #{alevelSourceFileId}, file_role = #{fileRole}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, match_status = #{matchStatus}, match_confidence = #{matchConfidence}, match_evidence_json = #{matchEvidenceJson}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE alevel_source_bundle_file_id = #{alevelSourceBundleFileId}
